name: Fish & Corn Rellenos Hunter
recipeIngredient: 6 New Mexico chiles (or equivalent), roasted, peeled, slit, and carefully deseeded
2 ears of fresh sweet corn, shucked
1 medium potato, cut into small dice
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the corn in boiling water for 5 minutes and let cool.
2. Strip the kernels from the ears with a sharp knife.
3. Bake or saute the fish until cooked through, then cut into small pieces and set aside.
4. Fry the diced potatoes on high heat until crispy and brown (turn occasionally for best results).
5. Add the onion and fry until clear.
6. Add the garlic and stir for 1 minute, then add the corn, fish, and oregano.
7. Heat through, stirring to mix thoroughly.
8. Stuff the peppers with about one-third cheese and two-thirds fish mixture.
9. Cook as above (either bake for 10 minutes at 350°F or batter and fry).
10. Serve with a fresh tomato/onion/cilantro/lime salsa cruda. Serves 2 as a main course, or 6 as an appetizer.
